SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins

Interface ClientSubscriptionPlugin.MessageDeliveryHandler

All Superinterfaces:
ReceivingI
Enclosing class:
ClientSubscriptionPlugin
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public static interface ClientSubscriptionPlugin.MessageDeliveryHandler extends ReceivingI
Owner-side callback for received messages. Kept as a named sub-interface of ReceivingI for source/binary compatibility with existing call sites that reference the type by name; new code may use ReceivingI directly. Both expose the same single abstract method onReceive(String, MessageI).

  • Method Summary

    Methods inherited from interface fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces.ReceivingI

    onReceive, onReceive

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
